# PatternFly Plugin

Everything you need for PatternFly development — React components, design guidance, migration, and MCP docs.

## What's Included

### Agents

- **PF Assist** (`pf-assist`) — PatternFly development routing — maps code changes, test gaps, scaffolding needs, and design work to the right PF sub-skills.
